articles.author: Jacek Krywko
articles.title: Magnetars drag spacetime to power superluminous supernovae - Ars Technica
articles.description: Frame-dragging may explain an odd pattern seen in the brightest supernovae.

articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
articles.title: The FBI is investigating malware hidden inside games hosted on Steam - TechCrunch
articles.description: The FBI believes a series of video games published on Steam in the last two years were embedded with malware by the same hacker.
articles.content:
The FBI is investigating a hacker suspected of publishing several video games laced with malware on the popular PC games store Steam, the agency said Friday. 
In its announcement looking for victims… [+1102 chars]
